name: Warm Springs Boat Ramp (Lower Deschutes)
notes: River mile 97.8 launch for the Warm Springs-Trout Creek wild redband water; boater pass required to float.

name: Mecca Flat Campground (Lower Deschutes)
notes: BLM site off US 26 near Warm Springs; day use free; southern end of the 7-mile Trout Creek bank trail.

name: Wizard Falls Fish Hatchery (Metolius River)
notes: ODFW hatchery on the wild, fly-only Metolius; river trail access both banks.

name: Camp Sherman day-use (Metolius River)
notes: Fish viewing platform and Metolius River Trail; wild trout, no stocking since 1996.

name: Lower Bridge Campground (Metolius River)
notes: Deschutes NF campground; trail access to lower fly water.

name: Chimney Rock Campground (Crooked River)
notes: BLM Wild & Scenic corridor below Bowman Dam along Hwy 27; fishing platform; day use free.

name: Palisades Campground (Crooked River)
notes: One of a dozen BLM pullouts on the redband tailwater below Bowman Dam; fishing platform.
